subject: Ecosystem Intel: Indian Funding & AgriTech: Active Growth with New Program Influx (March 2026)
aiIntro: Ecosystem Intelligence Update: A comprehensive scan of the Indian Funding and AgriTech Ecosystem for March 2026 reveals a dynamically expanding landscape. This period saw the addition of 6 new incubation and funding initiatives, alongside sustained activity across existing programs, with no recorded closures. The observed programs span a broad spectrum, including corporate innovation challenges, government-backed startup support schemes, specialized agri-tech accelerators, and international collaboration platforms, signaling robust support infrastructure for nascent ventures within the sector.
opportunities: STPI Next Generation Incubation Scheme (NGIS) / LEAP Ahead
India Australia RISE Accelerator (Round 4: Alumni Scale-up)
SISFS Incubator Grant (To act as Seed Fund partner)
